reviews.review_msg: What an amazing professor, wow. he is so funny. He is also a very fair and understanding professor. Very fair marker. Great grade distribution, readings are important but dead boring. The finals are sometimes optional, he is awesome.

Incredibly interesting professor, able to convey complex material clearly and assigns projects which are often useful in your portfolio. He is one of the few professors able to blend high-minded theory with practical output projects. He rules, hard.
You cant ask for a better prof!

Roman is interesting, has clearly done a lot in his life. Drew complex material together in interesting ways. I took Power and Affect - best classes I've taken at SFU. Too bad they're not offered anymore! Very fun and casual. He appreciates intelligent students.

Roman is by far the most engaging prof - he made lectures interesting and fun! It was the only lecture I actually looked forward to attending every week. He is a fair marker and he knows what he's talking about.
I have taken CMNS 110, 210 and 354 with Roman. He is awesome. The mid-term is quite fair. I would definitely recommend his class.
he is willing to answer any question clearly, he gives a very fare assignmnt and mid-term, he explains the theories in a easier way so that students can undertand quite well.

Extremely engaging prof, his lectures will never be boring! He really encourages self thinking, so the books we used for the semester don't make sense if you don't put in any effort with making the connections yourselves. Oh and there's an optional take home final--HELL YEAH!

Graet course - I took both the POwer and Seduction/Fashion section... What you learn will not help you much with your other cmns courses, but it will come in priceless later on in life... And make sure you attend seminars, they are short and sweet.
